title: Harpoon Over Trident
description: Replaces the Trident with a Harpoon. Requires Entity Model (+ Texture) Features!
body:
Replaces the Trident with a Harpoon and... that's it. This is a simple visual replacement of the Trident.
Comes with a custom model & texture.
**Requires Entity Model Features (and Entity Texture Features) in order to work!**
